CREQ_go_catalog.title: Catalog struct definition
CREQ_go_catalog.content: The type Catalog shall declare a Name field of type string.

CREQ_go_reader.title: Reader interface
CREQ_go_reader.content: The interface Reader shall declare a single Read() method returning a string.

CREQ_go_load_catalog.title: LoadCatalog factory
CREQ_go_load_catalog.content: The function LoadCatalog shall return a Catalog populated from the given path.

CREQ_go_save_catalog.title: SaveCatalog persistence
CREQ_go_save_catalog.content: The function SaveCatalog shall return true when the write succeeded.
